2604.27311.title: Pragmos: A Process Agentic Modeling System
2604.27311.paper_summary: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly transformed tasks across Software Engineering. In the context of Business Process Management, LLMs are now being explored as tools to derive process models directly from textual descriptions. Existing approaches range from chatbot-driven systems that assist with iterative, text-based modeling to fully automated end-to-end modeling assistants. However, we argue that process modeling is inherently complex and cannot be effectively addressed through black-box solutions. Instead, we envision modeling as an open-ended conversational activity, best supported by an interactive, iterative process involving both humans and LLM. In our approach, the modeling task is decomposed into smaller, manageable steps. Each step results in intermediate artifacts and explicitly documents the rationale behind each modeling decision. During this process, we incrementally uncover simple behavioral relations that guide the construction of the model. Given the current limitations of LLMs in reasoning about complex dependencies, we complement them with specialized tools developed in the field to structure process models based on behavioral relations. This hybrid approach enables the generation of sound, yet comprehensible models that evolve through transparent and explainable steps. In this paper, we present our research agenda and introduce Pragmos, a prototype system that operationalizes this vision. Pragmos demonstrates how LLMs can collaborate with human users as both domain and modeling experts to co-create evolving process models through a structured and explainable workflow.
2604.27311.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的出現顯著改變了軟體工程中的各項任務。<lb/>在商業流程管理的背景下，LLMs 現在被探索作為直接從文本描述中推導流程模型的工具。<lb/>現有的方法範圍從驅動聊天機器人的系統，協助進行迭代的文本建模，到完全自動化的端到端建模助手。<lb/>然而，我們認為流程建模本質上是複雜的，無法通過黑箱解決方案有效處理。<lb/>相反，我們將建模視為一種開放式的對話活動，最適合由涉及人類和 LLM 的互動性、迭代過程來支持。<lb/>在我們的方法中，建模任務被分解為較小、可管理的步驟。<lb/>每個步驟都產生中間產物，並明確記錄每個建模決策背後的理由。<lb/>在此過程中，我們逐步揭示簡單的行為關係，這些關係指導模型的構建。<lb/>鑒於 LLM 在推理複雜依賴關係方面的當前限制，我們用該領域內開發的專門工具來補充它們，以根據行為關係結構化流程模型。<lb/>這種混合方法使得生成的模型既可靠又易於理解，並通過透明且可解釋的步驟不斷演變。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了我們的研究議程，並介紹了 Pragmos，一個將這一願景具體化的原型系統。<lb/>Pragmos 展示了 LLM 如何與人類用戶作為領域和建模專家合作，通過結構化和可解釋的工作流程共同創建不斷演變的流程模型。
2604.27311.author: Pedro-Aarón Hernández-Ávalos et.al.
